use_cases: Display social media platform links with professional styling on personal portfolios or developer profiles
Provide quick access to LinkedIn and GitHub connections in a visually engaging card layout
Serve as a contact section component for SaaS landing pages or personal websites
ai_summary: A professional social connection component featuring gradient-styled platform cards for LinkedIn and GitHub with mouse-tracking cursor effects and hover glow animations. Designed for developer portfolios, creator profiles, and SaaS landing pages requiring elegant contact/social link sections with dark theme aesthetics.
